description: Provides context for how a Society began. Use with History Meaning table for additional inspiration. Part of the Society Crafter system.

descriptionTranslations.en: Provides context for how a Society began. Use with History Meaning table for additional inspiration. Part of the Society Crafter system.

entries.result: Opportunity: An opportunity brought people together. For instance, discovering gold to mine

resultTranslations.en: Opportunity: An opportunity brought people together. For instance, discovering gold to mine

entries.result: Forced: The Society's founders did not choose to start this place, they were forced by circumstances. Maybe they were shipwrecked or fled from persecution

resultTranslations.en: Forced: The Society's founders did not choose to start this place, they were forced by circumstances. Maybe they were shipwrecked or fled from persecution

entries.result: Ideals: The founders were brought together by an idea or ideal. For instance, they may have been practitioners of the same profession or religion

resultTranslations.en: Ideals: The founders were brought together by an idea or ideal. For instance, they may have been practitioners of the same profession or religion

entries.result: Commerce: This Society started for economic reasons. For instance, it was a frequent point of trade

resultTranslations.en: Commerce: This Society started for economic reasons. For instance, it was a frequent point of trade

entries.result: Protection: The Society initially drew together for protection against something else

resultTranslations.en: Protection: The Society initially drew together for protection against something else

entries.result: Colony: The Society was initially a colony or offshoot of a larger, more successful Society. That may no longer be true today

resultTranslations.en: Colony: The Society was initially a colony or offshoot of a larger, more successful Society. That may no longer be true today

entries.result: Legend: The Society's origins are so wrapped in myth and legend that it's impossible to tell if it's true or not

resultTranslations.en: Legend: The Society's origins are so wrapped in myth and legend that it's impossible to tell if it's true or not

entries.description: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled
